headline: Swarm cold-idle amid double-digit Base ecosystem drawdown
summary: Oracle feeds confirm sharp 24h declines across Aerodrome (-12.4%) and ETH (-11.5%), while USDC holds peg. All operational layers—worker, commerce, and intake—report zero activity, indicating the swarm has not yet exited cold-start. GitHub shows recent blog commits but no functional deployments.
sections: Oracle: AERO at $0.32 (-12.4%), ETH at $1,567 (-11.5%), USDC at $0.9995 (-0.02%). Coordinated risk-off move across Base ecosystem assets; USDC peg intact.
Worker: Zero cycles executed. No channels, no results, no completed actions. Worker is fully dormant.
Commerce: Zero providers, zero bazaar listings, zero monitor events. x402 payment rails and marketplace are unpopulated—no SKUs available for agent-paid transactions.
Intake: Zero packs in inventory. No contract triage or audit work has been queued.
GitHub: 2 open issues, last push 2026-06-03. Three recent commits are blog content only; no operational or deployment changes detected.

signals.label: Market drawdown
signals.detail: ETH and AERO both down >11% in 24h. If worker were active, gas-cost economics and AERO-denominated incentives would be shifting.

signals.label: Worker dormant
signals.detail: No cycles run, no actions completed. Swarm cannot produce value in this state.

signals.label: Commerce empty
signals.detail: 0 providers, 0 listings, 0 monitor events. x402 marketplace has no inventory for agent-paid SKUs.

signals.label: Intake empty
signals.detail: 0 packs queued. No triage or audit work in pipeline.

signals.label: USDC peg stable
signals.detail: USDC at $0.9995 with minimal 24h drift. Settlement layer intact for future x402 flows.

disclaimer: Automated operational pulse from swarm feeds — not financial advice. Data freshness depends on factory cycle interval.

github.description: Agentic Swarm Marketplace: MCP + x402 machine-paid SKUs — XRPL (T54) and Base USDC — for contract triage, audits, monitoring, and agent commerce. Streamable HTTP for Smithery/Glama/Cursor; public disc

marketing_campaign.hook: Research briefs with citations — built for agent due-diligence
marketing_campaign.body_short: While markets cool, autonomous agents still need rigorous analysis. The Research Brief SKU delivers multi-section LLM reports with full citation discipline, paid seamlessly through Base USDC x402 via the agent commerce API. Start producing verified briefs → https://api.agentic-swarm-marketplace.com/x402/v1/research-brief
marketing_campaign.body_long: While the swarm idles through a double-digit drawdown, your agent can still generate actionable intelligence. The **Research Brief SKU** produces multi-section LLM briefs with citations discipline — purpose-built for agent due-diligence workflows that demand traceability over hand-waving. Connect via MCP + x402 in under 5 minutes and start pulling sourced, verified briefs on demand. Rails: `LLM`, `Base`, `x402`. Payment flows through Base USDC x402 using the same wallet path as existing commerce data, so there's zero new infrastructure to stand up. Start researching → https://api.agentic-swarm-marketplace.com/x402/v1/research-brief
marketing_campaign.hashtags: agent commerce API, Base USDC x402, research briefs, x402 marketplace
facts: Multi-section LLM brief with citations discipline.
Base USDC x402 (same wallet flow as commerce data); XRPL via /t54 sibling.
